cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees frequently praise the company for respecting their personal lives and offering flexible work options.

cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Feedback on compensation is mixed, with some employees valuing the benefits package while others report stagnant pay.

cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: Many staff members feel supported in their career progression, though some note that organizational politics can hinder advancement.

cluster_summaries.label: Culture & Belonging
cluster_summaries.summary: The collaborative and inclusive nature of teams is a major driver of employee satisfaction.

cluster_summaries.label: Safety & Fairness
cluster_summaries.summary: While some feel secure, others express concerns about the integrity of the work environment.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: Fast-paced changes and high-pressure environments lead to exhaustion for some employees.

cluster_summaries.label: Disconnected Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Most employees report a positive environment, with few instances of feeling isolated or disconnected.

cluster_summaries.label: Work-Life Pressure
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees report that disorganized leadership and lack of prioritization negatively impact their work-life balance.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Internal politics and toxic management behaviors are cited as significant barriers to a healthy work environment.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees feel overlooked for growth opportunities or restricted by their specific role or site location.
